sites_coordinates_pair_check.name: sites_coordinates_pair_check
sites_coordinates_pair_check.value: ("sites"."latitude" is null and "sites"."longitude" is null) or ("sites"."latitude" is not null and "sites"."longitude" is not null)

sites_geocoding_metadata_check.name: sites_geocoding_metadata_check
sites_geocoding_metadata_check.value: ("sites"."latitude" is null and "sites"."longitude" is null and "sites"."geocoding_provider" is null and "sites"."geocoded_at" is null) or ("sites"."latitude" is not null and "sites"."longitude" is not null and "sites"."geocoding_provider" is not null and "sites"."geocoded_at" is not null)

work_items_blocked_reason_matches_status.name: work_items_blocked_reason_matches_status_chk
work_items_blocked_reason_matches_status.value: ("work_items"."status" = 'blocked' and "work_items"."blocked_reason" is not null) or ("work_items"."status" <> 'blocked' and "work_items"."blocked_reason" is null)

work_items_completed_at_matches_status_c.name: work_items_completed_at_matches_status_chk
work_items_completed_at_matches_status_c.value: ("work_items"."status" = 'completed' and "work_items"."completed_at" is not null) or ("work_items"."status" <> 'completed' and "work_items"."completed_at" is null)

work_items_completed_by_matches_status_c.name: work_items_completed_by_matches_status_chk
work_items_completed_by_matches_status_c.value: ("work_items"."status" = 'completed' and "work_items"."completed_by_user_id" is not null) or ("work_items"."status" <> 'completed' and "work_items"."completed_by_user_id" is null)
